summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were found, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed or safe for this shard. All listed PRs should remain open pending author/maintainer follow-up, proof, or separate review.
